pr.title: Non-record: Discarding Transformers. Elastic Associative Memory as a Language Model, 97% Intelligence Transfer in 14MBs

output.summary: Replaces the inference transformer with an elastic associative memory storing teacher hidden states so evaluation runs as encoder→EAM read→decoder (plus kNN).
techniques: Teacher hidden states written into additive counter-based EAM
Encoder/decoder learn mappings to/from EAM key space
EAM reads complemented by flat kNN store for prediction
